o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : table "user_roles" does not exist, skipping Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade 2026-04-04T20:45:19.945+05:30 WARN 2740 --- [ main] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : SQL Warning Code: 0, SQLState: 00000 2026-04-04T20:45:19.945+05:30 WARN 2740 --- [ main] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : table "users" does not exist, skipping Hibernate: create table audit_logs ( id bigserial not null, timestamp timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint, ip_address varchar(45), action varchar(50) not null, entity_id varchar(100), entity_type varchar(100), new_value TEXT, old_value TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table budgets ( amount_limit numeric(19,2) not null, month_year varchar(7) not null, category_id bigint not null, created_by bigint not null, id bigserial not null, primary key (id), unique (category_id, month_year) ) Hibernate: create table categories ( color_hex varchar(7), id bigserial not null, icon varchar(50), name varchar(100) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table merchant_tags ( id bigserial not null, transaction_id bigint not null unique, merchant_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table refresh_tokens ( revoked boolean not null, expires_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigserial not null, user_id bigint not null, token_hash varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( id bigserial not null, name varchar(20) not null unique check (name in ('VIEWER','ANALYST','ADMIN')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table transaction_dna ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigserial not null, transaction_id bigint not null unique, dna_hash varchar(64) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table transactions ( amount numeric(19,2) not null, date date not null, is_deleted boolean not null, category_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6), created_by bigint not null, id bigserial not null, updated_at timestamp(6), type varchar(10) not null check (type in ('INCOME','EXPENSE')), idempotency_key varchar(255) unique, notes TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table user_roles ( role_id bigint not null, user_id bigint not null, primary key (role_id, user_id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( is_active boolean not null, velocity_score float(53) not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, timezone varchar(50) not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, full_name varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists budgets add constraint FKn7qib00712y8dwelmqfwis6ka foreign key (category_id) references categories Hibernate: alter table if exists budgets add constraint FKt7080wlkaubmcpc056wieffuc foreign key (created_by) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists merchant_tags add constraint FK9tuqme3nx3wo2v0jvt7ghnakm foreign key (transaction_id) references transactions Hibernate: alter table if exists refresh_tokens add constraint FK1lih5y2npsf8u5o3vhdb9y0os foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists transaction_dna add constraint FKqu2c1cvbg7x7wt8jnfp3hd41y foreign key (transaction_id) references transactions Hibernate: alter table if exists transactions add constraint FKsqqi7sneo04kast0o138h19mv foreign key (category_id) references categories Hibernate: alter table if exists transactions add constraint FKejem3mgn2s0rcputq0m42nx1t foreign key (created_by) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKh8ciramu9cc9q3qcqiv4ue8a6 foreign key (role_id) references roles Hibernate: alter table if exists user_roles add constraint FKhfh9dx7w3ubf1co1vdev94g3f foreign key (user_id) references users 2026-04-04T20:45:20.068+05:30 INFO 2740 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-04T20:45:20.500+05:30 INFO 2740 --- [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-04-04T20:45:22.049+05:30 INFO 2740 --- [ main] c.f.r.TransactionRepositoryTest : Started TransactionRepositoryTest in 6.339 seconds (process running for 28.229) Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category_id, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.created_by, t1_0.date, t1_0.is_deleted, t1_0.idempotency_key, t1_0.notes, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 Hibernate: insert into roles (name) values (?) Hibernate: insert into users (is_active, created_at, email, full_name, password_hash, timezone, velocity_score) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into categories (color_hex, icon, name) values (?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category_id, created_at, created_by, date, is_deleted, idempotency_key, notes, type, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category_id, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.created_by, t1_0.date, t1_0.is_deleted, t1_0.idempotency_key, t1_0.notes, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.idempotency_key=?

testcase.name: save_and_findById
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category_id, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.created_by, t1_0.date, t1_0.is_deleted, t1_0.idempotency_key, t1_0.notes, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 Hibernate: insert into roles (name) values (?) Hibernate: insert into users (is_active, created_at, email, full_name, password_hash, timezone, velocity_score) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into categories (color_hex, icon, name) values (?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category_id, created_at, created_by, date, is_deleted, idempotency_key, notes, type, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

testcase.name: softDelete_hiddenFromActiveQuery
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category_id, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.created_by, t1_0.date, t1_0.is_deleted, t1_0.idempotency_key, t1_0.notes, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 Hibernate: insert into roles (name) values (?) Hibernate: insert into users (is_active, created_at, email, full_name, password_hash, timezone, velocity_score) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into categories (color_hex, icon, name) values (?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category_id, created_at, created_by, date, is_deleted, idempotency_key, notes, type, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category_id, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.created_by, t1_0.date, t1_0.is_deleted, t1_0.idempotency_key, t1_0.notes, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 where not(t1_0.is_deleted) offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: sumIncome_and_sumExpenses
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select t1_0.id, t1_0.amount, t1_0.category_id, t1_0.created_at, t1_0.created_by, t1_0.date, t1_0.is_deleted, t1_0.idempotency_key, t1_0.notes, t1_0.type, t1_0.updated_at from transactions t1_0 Hibernate: insert into roles (name) values (?) Hibernate: insert into users (is_active, created_at, email, full_name, password_hash, timezone, velocity_score) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into categories (color_hex, icon, name) values (?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category_id, created_at, created_by, date, is_deleted, idempotency_key, notes, type, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into transactions (amount, category_id, created_at, created_by, date, is_deleted, idempotency_key, notes, type, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select coalesce(sum(t1_0.amount), 0) from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.type='INCOME' and t1_0.is_deleted=false Hibernate: select coalesce(sum(t1_0.amount), 0) from transactions t1_0 where t1_0.type='EXPENSE' and t1_0.is_deleted=false
